question: How many active users did we have as of 2025-06-30?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT e.user_id) FROM activity_event e JOIN account a ON a.account_id=e.account_id WHERE e.event_category IN ('feature_use','api_call') AND e.occurred_at >= date('2025-06-30','-28 day') AND e.occurred_at <= '2025-06-30' AND a.account_type NOT IN ('demo','internal_test')
wrong_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM activity_event WHERE occurred_at >= date('2025-06-30','-30 day') AND occurred_at <= '2025-06-30'
note: 28d+billable categories+exclude test accounts vs naive 30d/any-event/all-accounts

question: What was our total MRR as of 2025-06-30?
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(s.mrr) FROM subscription s JOIN account a ON a.account_id=s.account_id WHERE s.ended_on IS NULL AND s.phase IN ('paid','grandfathered') AND a.account_type NOT IN ('demo','internal_test')
wrong_sql: SELECT SUM(p.list_price) FROM subscription s JOIN plan p ON p.plan_id=s.plan_id WHERE s.ended_on IS NULL
note: normalized mrr + phase subset + exclude test accounts vs raw list_price over all active

question: What is our MRR broken down by region as of 2025-06-30?
gold_sql: SELECT a.region, SUM(s.mrr) FROM subscription s JOIN account a ON a.account_id=s.account_id WHERE s.ended_on IS NULL AND s.phase IN ('paid','grandfathered') AND a.account_type NOT IN ('demo','internal_test') GROUP BY a.region ORDER BY a.region
wrong_sql: SELECT a.region, SUM(p.list_price) FROM subscription s JOIN plan p ON p.plan_id=s.plan_id JOIN account a ON a.account_id=s.account_id WHERE s.ended_on IS NULL GROUP BY a.region ORDER BY a.region
note: normalized mrr per governed segment vs raw list_price over all active subs including test/trial/comped

question: How many active users did we have in each region as of 2025-06-30?
gold_sql: SELECT a.region, COUNT(DISTINCT e.user_id) FROM activity_event e JOIN account a ON a.account_id=e.account_id WHERE e.event_category IN ('feature_use','api_call') AND e.occurred_at >= date('2025-06-30','-28 day') AND e.occurred_at <= '2025-06-30' AND a.account_type NOT IN ('demo','internal_test') GROUP BY a.region ORDER BY a.region
wrong_sql: SELECT a.region, COUNT(DISTINCT e.user_id) FROM activity_event e JOIN account a ON a.account_id=e.account_id WHERE e.occurred_at >= date('2025-06-30','-30 day') AND e.occurred_at <= '2025-06-30' GROUP BY a.region ORDER BY a.region
note: governed active users (28d, feature_use/api_call, exclude test accounts) by region vs naive 30d/any-category/all-accounts by region

question: How much recurring revenue did we lose to churn in Q1 2025?
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(-m.mrr_delta) FROM mrr_movement m JOIN account a ON a.account_id=m.account_id WHERE m.type='churn' AND m.occurred_on >= '2025-01-01' AND m.occurred_on <= '2025-03-31' AND a.account_type NOT IN ('demo','internal_test')
wrong_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscription WHERE ended_on >= '2025-01-01' AND ended_on <= '2025-03-31'
note: revenue-weighted MRR churn from governed movements vs logo churn count that includes trial cancellations

question: What is our average MRR per paying account as of 2025-06-30?
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(s.mrr) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT s.account_id) FROM subscription s JOIN account a ON a.account_id=s.account_id JOIN plan p ON p.plan_id=s.plan_id WHERE s.ended_on IS NULL AND s.phase IN ('paid','grandfathered') AND p.tier IN ('starter','pro','enterprise') AND a.account_type NOT IN ('demo','internal_test')
wrong_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(s.mrr) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT s.account_id) FROM subscription s WHERE s.ended_on IS NULL
note: MRR / paying accounts (paid+grandfathered, starter/pro/enterprise tiers, non-test) vs MRR / all active subscription accounts (includes trial, comped, demo, internal_test, free/staff tiers)

question: What was our billed revenue for January 2025?
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(i.amount) FROM invoice i JOIN account a ON a.account_id=i.account_id WHERE i.issued_on >= '2025-01-01' AND i.issued_on <= '2025-01-31' AND a.account_type NOT IN ('demo','internal_test')
wrong_sql: SELECT SUM(amount) FROM invoice WHERE issued_on >= '2025-01-01' AND issued_on <= '2025-01-31'
note: billed invoices joined to account to exclude demo/internal_test (1188) vs naive invoice sum including test accounts (1336) -- test accounts have real Jan 2025 invoices in this seed

question: What was our revenue recognition total for January 2025?
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(rr.amount) FROM revenue_recognition rr JOIN invoice i ON i.invoice_id=rr.invoice_id JOIN account a ON a.account_id=i.account_id WHERE rr.recognized_on >= '2025-01-01' AND rr.recognized_on <= '2025-01-31' AND a.account_type NOT IN ('demo','internal_test')
wrong_sql: SELECT SUM(amount) FROM invoice WHERE issued_on >= '2025-01-01' AND issued_on <= '2025-01-31'
note: GAAP-recognized monthly amortization joined invoice->account to exclude test accounts (99) vs lump-sum invoice amount with no exclusion (1336) -- wrong table and wrong exclusion

question: How many active users as of 2025-06-30 were on paying accounts?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT e.user_id) FROM activity_event e JOIN account a ON a.account_id=e.account_id JOIN subscription s ON s.account_id=e.account_id WHERE e.event_category IN ('feature_use','api_call') AND e.occurred_at >= date('2025-06-30','-28 day') AND e.occurred_at <= '2025-06-30' AND a.account_type NOT IN ('demo','internal_test') AND s.ended_on IS NULL AND s.phase IN ('paid','grandfathered')
wrong_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT e.user_id) FROM activity_event e JOIN subscription s ON s.account_id=e.account_id WHERE s.ended_on IS NULL AND e.occurred_at >= date('2025-06-30','-30 day') AND e.occurred_at <= '2025-06-30'
note: governed active users (28d, feature_use/api_call, paid/grandfathered phase only, non-test) = 4 vs naive 30d/any-event/any-phase/all-accounts = 13

question: How many active users did we have in the us-east region as of 2025-06-30?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT e.user_id) FROM activity_event e JOIN account a ON a.account_id=e.account_id WHERE e.event_category IN ('feature_use','api_call') AND e.occurred_at >= date('2025-06-30','-28 day') AND e.occurred_at <= '2025-06-30' AND a.account_type NOT IN ('demo','internal_test') AND a.region='us-east'
wrong_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT e.user_id) FROM activity_event e JOIN account a ON a.account_id=e.account_id WHERE e.occurred_at >= date('2025-06-30','-30 day') AND e.occurred_at <= '2025-06-30' AND a.region='us-east'
note: governed active users in us-east (28d, feature_use/api_call, exclude demo/internal_test) = 2 vs naive 30d/any-event/all-accounts = 4 (adds demo-10 and internal_test-13 users)

question: What is our MRR broken down by plan tier as of 2025-06-30?
gold_sql: SELECT p.tier, SUM(s.mrr) FROM subscription s JOIN account a ON a.account_id=s.account_id JOIN plan p ON p.plan_id=s.plan_id WHERE s.ended_on IS NULL AND s.phase IN ('paid','grandfathered') AND a.account_type NOT IN ('demo','internal_test') GROUP BY p.tier ORDER BY p.tier
wrong_sql: SELECT p.tier, SUM(p.list_price) FROM subscription s JOIN plan p ON p.plan_id=s.plan_id WHERE s.ended_on IS NULL GROUP BY p.tier ORDER BY p.tier
note: governed MRR per tier (paid+grandfathered, non-test, normalized mrr) vs raw list_price per tier across all active phases including trial/comped/staff and test accounts

question: What was our MRR in the eu-west region as of 2025-06-30?
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(s.mrr) FROM subscription s JOIN account a ON a.account_id=s.account_id WHERE s.ended_on IS NULL AND s.phase IN ('paid','grandfathered') AND a.account_type NOT IN ('demo','internal_test') AND a.region='eu-west'
wrong_sql: SELECT SUM(p.list_price) FROM subscription s JOIN plan p ON p.plan_id=s.plan_id JOIN account a ON a.account_id=s.account_id WHERE s.ended_on IS NULL AND a.region='eu-west'
note: governed eu-west MRR (normalized mrr, paid+grandfathered, non-test) = 99 vs raw list_price across all active phases and test accounts = 1287

question: What share of our MRR as of 2025-06-30 comes from accounts on annual billing plans?
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.billing_interval='annual' THEN s.mrr ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(s.mrr) FROM subscription s JOIN account a ON a.account_id=s.account_id JOIN plan p ON p.plan_id=s.plan_id WHERE s.ended_on IS NULL AND s.phase IN ('paid','grandfathered') AND a.account_type NOT IN ('demo','internal_test')
wrong_sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.billing_interval='annual' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) FROM subscription s JOIN plan p ON p.plan_id=s.plan_id WHERE s.ended_on IS NULL
note: MRR-weighted annual share over governed paying accounts = 0.115 vs logo-count fraction of all active subscriptions on annual plans = 0.067 (different numerator, wrong denominator, wrong inclusions)

question: What is our ARR as of 2025-06-30?
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(s.mrr) * 12 FROM subscription s JOIN account a ON a.account_id=s.account_id WHERE s.ended_on IS NULL AND s.phase IN ('paid','grandfathered') AND a.account_type NOT IN ('demo','internal_test')
wrong_sql: SELECT SUM(p.list_price) FROM subscription s JOIN plan p ON p.plan_id=s.plan_id WHERE s.ended_on IS NULL
note: ARR = 12 x governed MRR (paid+grandfathered, non-test, normalized mrr) = 15456 vs sum of plan list_prices over all active subscriptions = 4450 (wrong because annual plans already state yearly price, includes test/trial/comped)

question: What is our ARR broken down by region as of 2025-06-30?
gold_sql: SELECT a.region, SUM(s.mrr) * 12 FROM subscription s JOIN account a ON a.account_id=s.account_id WHERE s.ended_on IS NULL AND s.phase IN ('paid','grandfathered') AND a.account_type NOT IN ('demo','internal_test') GROUP BY a.region ORDER BY a.region
wrong_sql: SELECT a.region, SUM(p.list_price) FROM subscription s JOIN plan p ON p.plan_id=s.plan_id JOIN account a ON a.account_id=s.account_id WHERE s.ended_on IS NULL GROUP BY a.region ORDER BY a.region
note: ARR = 12 x governed MRR by region vs raw list_price sums across all active subscriptions per region including test/trial/comped accounts

question: What is our average MRR per paying account in each region as of 2025-06-30?
gold_sql: SELECT a.region, CAST(SUM(s.mrr) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT s.account_id) FROM subscription s JOIN account a ON a.account_id=s.account_id JOIN plan p ON p.plan_id=s.plan_id WHERE s.ended_on IS NULL AND s.phase IN ('paid','grandfathered') AND p.tier IN ('starter','pro','enterprise') AND a.account_type NOT IN ('demo','internal_test') GROUP BY a.region ORDER BY a.region
wrong_sql: SELECT a.region, CAST(SUM(s.mrr) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT s.account_id) FROM subscription s JOIN account a ON a.account_id=s.account_id WHERE s.ended_on IS NULL GROUP BY a.region ORDER BY a.region
note: ARPU per governed paying account (paid+grandfathered, starter/pro/enterprise tiers, non-test) by region vs naive MRR/accounts over all active subscriptions including trial/comped/free/staff/test

question: What is our average MRR per paying account on the pro tier as of 2025-06-30?
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(s.mrr) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT s.account_id) FROM subscription s JOIN account a ON a.account_id=s.account_id JOIN plan p ON p.plan_id=s.plan_id WHERE s.ended_on IS NULL AND s.phase IN ('paid','grandfathered') AND p.tier='pro' AND a.account_type NOT IN ('demo','internal_test')
wrong_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(s.mrr) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT s.account_id) FROM subscription s JOIN plan p ON p.plan_id=s.plan_id WHERE s.ended_on IS NULL AND p.tier='pro'
note: ARPU for pro-tier governed paying accounts (paid+grandfathered, non-test) = 91.0 vs naive pro-tier MRR / all active pro-tier accounts including test/trial/comped = 80.69

question: How much recurring revenue did we lose to churn in H1 2025?
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(-m.mrr_delta) FROM mrr_movement m JOIN account a ON a.account_id=m.account_id WHERE m.type='churn' AND m.occurred_on >= '2025-01-01' AND m.occurred_on <= '2025-06-30' AND a.account_type NOT IN ('demo','internal_test')
wrong_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscription WHERE ended_on >= '2025-01-01' AND ended_on <= '2025-06-30'
note: revenue-weighted MRR churn from governed movements in H1 = 299 vs logo count of all subscriptions ended in H1 = 5 (includes trial cancellations, wrong unit)

question: Which subscription plan tier saw the most recurring revenue churned in H1 2025?
gold_sql: SELECT p.tier, SUM(-m.mrr_delta) AS churned_mrr FROM mrr_movement m JOIN subscription s ON s.subscription_id=m.subscription_id JOIN plan p ON p.plan_id=s.plan_id JOIN account a ON a.account_id=m.account_id WHERE m.type='churn' AND m.occurred_on >= '2025-01-01' AND m.occurred_on <= '2025-06-30' AND a.account_type NOT IN ('demo','internal_test') GROUP BY p.tier ORDER BY churned_mrr DESC
wrong_sql: SELECT p.tier, COUNT(*) AS churned_count FROM subscription s JOIN plan p ON p.plan_id=s.plan_id WHERE s.ended_on >= '2025-01-01' AND s.ended_on <= '2025-06-30' GROUP BY p.tier ORDER BY churned_count DESC
note: tier ranked by churned MRR from governed movements (enterprise leads at $299) vs tier ranked by count of ended subscriptions (starter leads at 3, includes trial cancellations)

question: What was our total billed revenue in Q1 2025?
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(i.amount) FROM invoice i JOIN account a ON a.account_id=i.account_id WHERE i.issued_on >= '2025-01-01' AND i.issued_on <= '2025-03-31' AND a.account_type NOT IN ('demo','internal_test')
wrong_sql: SELECT SUM(amount) FROM invoice WHERE issued_on >= '2025-01-01' AND issued_on <= '2025-03-31'
note: billed Q1 joined to account to exclude demo/internal_test = 1536 vs naive Q1 invoice sum including test accounts = 1684 (test accounts have Jan 2025 biting invoices)

question: What was our revenue recognition total for Q1 2025?
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(rr.amount) FROM revenue_recognition rr JOIN invoice i ON i.invoice_id=rr.invoice_id JOIN account a ON a.account_id=i.account_id WHERE rr.recognized_on >= '2025-01-01' AND rr.recognized_on <= '2025-03-31' AND a.account_type NOT IN ('demo','internal_test')
wrong_sql: SELECT SUM(amount) FROM invoice WHERE issued_on >= '2025-01-01' AND issued_on <= '2025-03-31'
note: GAAP-recognized Q1 amortization (non-test) = 645 vs billed invoice totals for Q1 = 1684 -- annual invoice for pro plan billed in full in Jan vs amortized at 99/month, plus test account exclusion

question: What was our revenue recognition total for February 2025?
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(rr.amount) FROM revenue_recognition rr JOIN invoice i ON i.invoice_id=rr.invoice_id JOIN account a ON a.account_id=i.account_id WHERE rr.recognized_on >= '2025-02-01' AND rr.recognized_on <= '2025-02-28' AND a.account_type NOT IN ('demo','internal_test')
wrong_sql: SELECT SUM(amount) FROM invoice WHERE issued_on >= '2025-02-01' AND issued_on <= '2025-02-28'
note: recognized Feb = 398 (includes 99 amortized from the annual plan invoice issued in Jan) vs billed Feb = 299 (only the Feb monthly invoice) -- gold exceeds wrong here, showing the reverse amortization direction

question: How much revenue did we recognize in H1 2025?
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(rr.amount) FROM revenue_recognition rr JOIN invoice i ON i.invoice_id=rr.invoice_id JOIN account a ON a.account_id=i.account_id WHERE rr.recognized_on >= '2025-01-01' AND rr.recognized_on <= '2025-06-30' AND a.account_type NOT IN ('demo','internal_test')
wrong_sql: SELECT SUM(amount) FROM invoice WHERE issued_on >= '2025-01-01' AND issued_on <= '2025-06-30'
note: GAAP-recognized H1 amortization (non-test) = 1983 vs billed H1 invoice total = 2725 -- annual plan billed 1188 in Jan but contributes only 594 to H1 recognition, plus test account exclusion

question: What was our total recognized revenue for the full year 2025?
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(rr.amount) FROM revenue_recognition rr JOIN invoice i ON i.invoice_id=rr.invoice_id JOIN account a ON a.account_id=i.account_id WHERE rr.recognized_on >= '2025-01-01' AND rr.recognized_on <= '2025-12-31' AND a.account_type NOT IN ('demo','internal_test')
wrong_sql: SELECT SUM(amount) FROM invoice WHERE issued_on >= '2025-01-01' AND issued_on <= '2025-12-31'
note: full-year GAAP recognized revenue (non-test) = 2577 vs billed invoice total for the year = 2725 -- test account invoices not excluded in wrong, wrong table choice (invoice vs revenue_recognition)

question: How many accounts are there in total?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM account
wrong_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "user"
note: pure structural: total account rows = 35 vs total user rows = 85; no business convention required

question: How many distinct plans do we offer?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM plan
wrong_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT tier) FROM plan
note: pure structural: total plan rows = 8 vs distinct tier values = 5; no business convention required

question: How many subscriptions are currently active?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscription WHERE ended_on IS NULL
wrong_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscription
note: pure structural: active (ended_on IS NULL) = 30 vs all subscriptions = 39; no business convention required

question: How many users are there in total?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "user"
wrong_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) FROM "user"
note: pure structural: total user rows = 85 vs distinct accounts with users = 35; no business convention required

question: How many invoices were issued in 2025?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invoice WHERE issued_on >= '2025-01-01' AND issued_on <= '2025-12-31'
wrong_sql: SELECT SUM(amount) FROM invoice WHERE issued_on >= '2025-01-01' AND issued_on <= '2025-12-31'
note: pure structural: count of 2025 invoices = 14 vs sum of 2025 invoice amounts = 2725.0; no business convention required

question: How many accounts are in each region?
gold_sql: SELECT region, COUNT(*) FROM account GROUP BY region ORDER BY region
wrong_sql: SELECT region, COUNT(DISTINCT account_type) FROM account GROUP BY region ORDER BY region
note: pure structural: account count per region vs distinct account_type count per region; no business convention required
